message:
feat(ui): wire Model to receive background worker snapshots (bv-m7v8)

Add integration between BackgroundWorker and UI Model:

- Add snapshot and backgroundWorker fields to Model struct
- Handle SnapshotReadyMsg with atomic pointer swap for thread-safety
- Preserve user selection across snapshot swaps
- Update legacy fields for backwards compatibility during migration
- Clean up backgroundWorker in Stop() method

This enables the UI to receive immutable snapshots from the background
worker without blocking the main thread. All tests pass with -race.
